гҖҖгҖҖThe new series on Renaissance painting, written and presented by Matthew Collings, begins with an artistic investigation into one of the most radiant and beautiful images in all of art history, The Madonna of the Meadow, painted in 1505 by Raphael.Renaissance art has become part of the 21st-century heritage industry but when Raphael was alive, it was a startling new form of vi...
